plan.failureSummary: Deterministic page.ai execution failed because it tried to interact with a cached combobox selector ('Select your occupation') that is not present on the current layout of this dynamic/unstable survey form. The form instead presents 'Age Group' radio options.
observedIndicators: The run failed during DETERMINISTIC mode using cached steps
The element 'Select your occupation' / '[role=combobox]' failed to resolve
Visual inspection of the failure screenshot confirms 'Age Group' radio buttons are present instead of the expected occupation dropdown
The page.ai instruction is highly flexible and dynamic ('Fill out all of the survey questions...')

remediationSteps.details: Clear the cached Page.AI instructions for this test and retry. This will force page.ai to run in non-deterministic mode and dynamically discover the fields present on the screen (such as 'Age Group') instead of looking for the stale 'Select your occupation' selector.

plan.notes: The survey form appears to have dynamic variations ('unstable-survey' test). Because the instruction is semantically flexible ('Fill out all of the survey questions with fake data'), clearing the page.ai cache and retrying will allow the autonomous agent to correctly handle the 'Age Group' field instead of looking for the stale 'Select your occupation' combobox.
